caption: A man with a shaved head and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark gray, ribbed sound-absorbing wall. He wears a white t-shirt with a small black logo on the left chest that reads "Savage Aesthetic" and "FITNESS CLUB," along with black over-ear headphones. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The man has tattoos on his right arm and holds his right hand up to the side of his head. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his facial expression from a slight smile with closed lips to an open-mouthed expression as if speaking, while gazing slightly off-camera to the right. His head tilts marginally, and his mouth opens further in the final frames, indicating he is in the middle of a conversation or recording.
